blocks.text: For general inquiries, please email us at the address below. For specific questions about classes, events, or donations, please include a clear subject line to help us direct your message to the appropriate team member. We strive to respond to all inquiries within 2-3 business days. Email: madison.chinese.dances@gmail.com Phone: (301)-299-1562 Mailing Address: PO Box 10067 Rockville, MD 20849
